(e.g. `skills/skill-improver`, `.claude/commands/harness-sweep`, `.claude/skills/harness-recall`)

## Claude Code version and operating system

(output of `claude --version`, plus macOS / Linux / Windows version)

## Reproduction steps

1.
2.
3.

## Expected behavior

What should have happened.

## Actual behavior

What did happen. Include any error message verbatim, the relevant tool calls if you can identify them, and a screenshot or log snippet if useful.

## Anything else

Additional context, related issues, or a hypothesis about the cause.
